commands.name: ALTER DATABASE
commands.sample_sql: ALTER DATABASE dev RENAME TO prod;

commands.name: ALTER DATASHARE
commands.sample_sql: ALTER DATASHARE s ADD TABLE public.t;

commands.name: ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES
commands.sample_sql: ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO PUBLIC;

commands.name: ALTER EXTERNAL VIEW
commands.sample_sql: ALTER EXTERNAL VIEW v AS SELECT 1;

commands.name: ALTER FUNCTION
commands.sample_sql: ALTER FUNCTION f(int) RENAME TO g;

commands.name: ALTER GROUP
commands.sample_sql: ALTER GROUP g ADD USER u;

commands.name: ALTER MASKING POLICY
commands.sample_sql: ALTER MASKING POLICY p RENAME TO q;

commands.name: ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW
commands.sample_sql: ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW mv RENAME TO mv2;

commands.name: ALTER RLS POLICY
commands.sample_sql: ALTER RLS POLICY p RENAME TO q;

commands.name: ALTER ROLE
commands.sample_sql: ALTER ROLE r RENAME TO s;

commands.name: ALTER PROCEDURE
commands.sample_sql: ALTER PROCEDURE p() RENAME TO q;

commands.name: ALTER SCHEMA
commands.sample_sql: ALTER SCHEMA s RENAME TO t;

commands.name: ALTER SYSTEM
commands.sample_sql: ALTER SYSTEM SET enable_result_cache_for_session TO off;

commands.name: ALTER TABLE
commands.sample_sql: ALTER TABLE public.t ADD COLUMN c int;

commands.name: ALTER TABLE APPEND
commands.sample_sql: ALTER TABLE target APPEND FROM source;

commands.name: ALTER TEMPLATE
commands.sample_sql: ALTER TEMPLATE t RENAME TO u;

commands.name: ALTER USER
commands.sample_sql: ALTER USER u RENAME TO v;

commands.name: ATTACH MASKING POLICY
commands.sample_sql: ATTACH MASKING POLICY p ON t(c) TO ROLE r;

commands.name: ATTACH RLS POLICY
commands.sample_sql: ATTACH RLS POLICY p ON t TO ROLE r;

commands.name: COPY
commands.sample_sql: COPY t FROM 's3://bucket/file' IAM_ROLE DEFAULT FORMAT AS CSV;

commands.name: CREATE EXTERNAL FUNCTION
commands.sample_sql: CREATE EXTERNAL FUNCTION f(int) RETURNS int STABLE LAMBDA 'arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:1:function:f' IAM_ROLE DEFAULT;

commands.name: CREATE EXTERNAL MODEL
commands.sample_sql: CREATE EXTERNAL MODEL m FUNCTION f IAM_ROLE DEFAULT MODEL_TYPE BEDROCK SETTINGS (MODEL_ID 'anthropic.claude-v2:1');

commands.name: CREATE EXTERNAL SCHEMA
commands.sample_sql: CREATE EXTERNAL SCHEMA s FROM DATA CATALOG DATABASE 'db' REGION 'us-east-1' IAM_ROLE DEFAULT;

commands.name: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE
commands.sample_sql: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE s.t (id INT) STORED AS PARQUET LOCATION 's3://bucket/';

commands.name: CREATE EXTERNAL VIEW
commands.sample_sql: CREATE EXTERNAL VIEW v AS SELECT 1;

commands.name: CREATE FUNCTION
commands.sample_sql: CREATE FUNCTION f() RETURNS int IMMUTABLE AS $$ SELECT 1 $$ LANGUAGE sql;

commands.name: CREATE IDENTITY PROVIDER
commands.sample_sql: CREATE IDENTITY PROVIDER idp TYPE azure;

commands.name: CREATE LIBRARY
commands.sample_sql: CREATE LIBRARY f LANGUAGE plpythonu FROM 's3://bucket/lib.zip' IAM_ROLE DEFAULT;

commands.name: CREATE MASKING POLICY
commands.sample_sql: CREATE MASKING POLICY p WITH (c int) USING (c);

commands.name: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW
commands.sample_sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv AS SELECT 1;

commands.name: CREATE MODEL
commands.sample_sql: CREATE MODEL m FROM (SELECT 1 AS x) TARGET x FUNCTION f IAM_ROLE DEFAULT;

commands.name: CREATE PROCEDURE
commands.sample_sql: CREATE PROCEDURE p() LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $$ BEGIN NULL; END $$;

commands.name: CREATE RLS POLICY
commands.sample_sql: CREATE RLS POLICY p WITH (c int) USING (c = 1);

commands.name: CREATE TABLE
commands.sample_sql: CREATE TABLE t (id INT) DISTSTYLE KEY DISTKEY(id) SORTKEY(id);

commands.name: CREATE TABLE AS
commands.sample_sql: CREATE TABLE t AS SELECT 1 AS id;

commands.name: DETACH MASKING POLICY
commands.sample_sql: DETACH MASKING POLICY p ON t(c) FROM ROLE r;

commands.name: DETACH RLS POLICY
commands.sample_sql: DETACH RLS POLICY p ON t FROM ROLE r;

commands.name: GRANT
commands.sample_sql: GRANT SELECT ON TABLE t TO PUBLIC;

commands.name: MERGE
commands.sample_sql: MERGE INTO target USING source ON target.id = source.id REMOVE DUPLICATES;

commands.name: REVOKE
commands.sample_sql: REVOKE SELECT ON TABLE t FROM PUBLIC;

commands.name: SELECT
commands.sample_sql: SELECT * EXCLUDE (password) FROM users QUALIFY id > 0;

commands.name: SELECT INTO
commands.sample_sql: SELECT id INTO new_users FROM users;

commands.name: SET SESSION CHARACTERISTICS
commands.sample_sql: SET SESSION CHARACTERISTICS AS TRANSACTION READ ONLY;

commands.name: SHOW COLUMN GRANTS
commands.sample_sql: SHOW COLUMN GRANTS ON TABLE public.t;

commands.name: SHOW SCHEMAS
commands.sample_sql: SHOW SCHEMAS FROM DATABASE dev LIMIT 10;

commands.name: SHOW TABLES
commands.sample_sql: SHOW TABLES FROM SCHEMA dev.public LIKE 't%' LIMIT 10;

commands.name: UNLOAD
commands.sample_sql: UNLOAD ('SELECT * FROM t') TO 's3://bucket/out' IAM_ROLE DEFAULT FORMAT AS CSV HEADER;

commands.name: UPDATE
commands.sample_sql: UPDATE t SET id = 2 WHERE id = 1;

commands.name: VACUUM
commands.sample_sql: VACUUM SORT ONLY t TO 95 PERCENT;
